name: Elicit
description: AI research assistant that helps you find, summarize, and understand academic papers. Uses language models to answer research questions and extract key information.

name: SciSpace
description: AI-powered platform to read, understand, and analyze research papers. Explains complex concepts and helps with literature review.

name: Litmaps
description: Literature mapping tool that visualizes connections between papers. Discover related research and build citation networks.

name: Jenni
description: AI writing assistant for academics. Helps with drafting, citations, and overcoming writer's block for papers and essays.

name: Julius
description: AI data analyst. Upload datasets, ask questions in natural language, and get statistical analysis and visualizations.

name: Notebook LM
description: Google's AI notebook for research. Ground an AI assistant in your documents, notes, and sources to summarize and explore ideas.

name: VOSviewer
description: Software for constructing and visualizing bibliometric networks. Map co-authorship, citation, and term co-occurrence for literature analysis.

name: Web of Science
description: Leading citation database. Search across journals, books, and conference proceedings. Track citations and research impact.

name: Google Scholar
description: Free academic search engine. Find papers across disciplines, track citations, and discover related research.

name: Ipsco
description: Research and analytics platform for academic literature and citation analysis.

name: Scopus
description: Elsevier's abstract and citation database. Millions of peer-reviewed articles, books, and conference papers. Author and journal metrics.
